title: OpenAI demand doubts cast shadow over AI server supply chain
description: OpenAI's aggressive push to secure AI computing capacity is facing growing scrutiny, with signs that its multibillion-dollar data center procurement plans may be reassessed, reportedly raising questions for a supply chain led by Quanta Computer, Wistron and Foxconn.

title: Vibe Coding : Unlocking the Power of AI‐Assisted Development with VS Code, Cline, and SAP AI Core
description: AI‐assisted development is transforming how developers build, test, and optimize applications. Gone are the days of switching endlessly between documentation, terminals, and dashboards. Today, intelligent coding tools like Cline, integrated directly into VS Code, work alongside developers — understa...

title: (AI)IMS bridging gaps in Indian autism care
description: AIIMS also reflected on a future where care for autism not only came via hospital visits but through smartphones, remote platforms and low-cost AI-assisted systems. Dr Gulati said, “For many, therapy remains costly, city-centred and difficult to sustain. AIIMS is attempting a different model by moving parts of care into the home.” She said her [...]

title: Google’s Gemini AI App Could Soon Start Showing Ads, Company Executive Reportedly Hints During Earnings Call
description: Google is planning to start showing commercials and sponsored results in the Gemini AI app, according to a report citing Google’s Chief Business Officer, Philipp Schindler. Gemini AI platform, the Mountain View-based tech giant’s conversational AI assistant, currently does not feature ads, unlike its primary competitor ChatGPT. During Google’s quarterly earnings...

title: Clean up AI or go away: rules proposed for data centres
description: Artificial intelligence companies should promise they have not broken the law before building a data centre in Australia, an inquiry has been told.
